description_long: This is a pair of dangling earrings displayed on a matte black jewelry stand. The earrings feature a central dark, possibly black, bead or stone, surrounded by concentric arcs of small green and white beads, creating a layered, scalloped effect. The hooks are metallic, likely gold or brass, and attach to the top of each earring. The beadwork is intricate, with the green and white beads forming a striking contrast against the dark centerpiece. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, suitable for both casual and festive urban settings. The jewelry stand is not part of the wearable item but serves to display the earrings prominently.
description: A pair of dangling earrings with black, green, and white beadwork, displayed on a matte black stand. The earrings feature a dark central bead surrounded by scalloped arcs of green and white beads.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings with their full beadwork pattern and color contrast clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view, revealing the profile of the earrings and the depth of the beadwork, with only one earring edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, showing the back of the jewelry stand with no visible details of the earrings.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, showing the profile and depth of the beadwork on the opposite earring.
